texto: The path of the righteous man is beset on all sides by the iniquities of the selfish and the tyranny of the evil men. Blessed is he who, in the name of charity and goodwill, shepherds the weak through the valley of darkness, for he is truly his brother's keeper, and the finder of lost children. And I will strike down upon thee with great vengeance and furious anger those who attempt to poison and destroy my brothers. And you will know my name is the Lord when I lay my vengeance upon thee!
explicacao: Citação de Ezekiel 25:17 sobre temas ligados a familia. “The path of the righteous man is beset on all sides by the iniquities of the selfish and the tyra…” articula familia, funny, humour em registro de familia, com relevância para contextos como reflexao-noturna e humour.
